app.title: Numori Notes
app.footer: Type calculations naturally. Notes auto-save locally.

basics.title: Basic Operations
basics.desc: Use standard operators (+, -, *, /) or natural language (plus, minus, times, divide).

variables.title: Variables
variables.desc: Assign values to variables and reuse them in calculations.

currency.title: Currency
currency.desc: Perform calculations with currencies and convert between them. Supports USD, EUR, GBP, JPY, and more.

units.title: Unit Conversions
units.desc: Convert between different units of measurement. Supports length, weight, volume, temperature, time, area, speed, and data.

si.title: SI Prefixes
si.desc: All SI-based units support SI prefixes (kilo, mega, giga, milli, micro, nano, etc.).

functions.title: Functions
functions.desc: Use mathematical functions for advanced calculations.

shortcuts.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
shortcuts.tip1: Press Enter to create a new line and continue calculating
shortcuts.tip2: Use Backspace on an empty line to delete it
shortcuts.tip4: All calculations update automatically as you type

appLock.title: App Lock
appLock.enabled: App is protected. Unlock required after timeout.
appLock.disabled: Protect the app with a PIN, password, or biometrics.
appLock.lockEnabled: App Lock enabled — set your PIN below
